metadata.description: AnswerTrust Cost & Agent Analysis — Azure Workbook over Application Insights telemetry (cost per conversation, agent hand-off topology, tool-call success matrix).
Resource ID of the Application Insights component the workbook queries. Override to match the deployed AppInsights resource.
Unique GUID for the workbook resource.

properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## AnswerTrust — Cost & Agent Analysis
Cross-agent cost, hand-off topology, and tool-call reliability for agentic answers traced through Application Insights. Pair with the Fabric Real-Time **AnswerTrust Observability** dashboard for per-answer trust scoring."}, "name": "header"}, {"type": 9, "content": {"version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "parameters": [{"id": "time-range", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TimeRange", "label": "Time range", "type": 4, "isRequired": true, "value": {"durationMs": 604800000}, "typeSettings": {"selectableValues": [{"durationMs": 3600000}, {"durationMs": 86400000}, {"durationMs": 604800000}, {"durationMs": 2592000000}]}}]}, "name": "parameters"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "customEvents
| where name == 'answer_provenance'
| extend cost_usd = todouble(customDimensions.cost_usd)
| summarize TotalCostUSD = sum(cost_usd) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc", "size": 0, "title": "Cost per Conversation (USD / day)", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 0}, "timeContextFromParameter": "TimeRange", "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.insights/components", "visualization": "timechart"}, "name": "cost-per-conversation"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "dependencies
| where type == 'invoke_agent'
| summarize HandoffCount = count() by SourceAgent = operation_Name, TargetAgent = target
| order by HandoffCount desc", "size": 0, "title": "Agent Hand-off Topology", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 0}, "timeContextFromParameter": "TimeRange", "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.insights/components", "visualization": "graph", "graphSettings": {"type": 0, "topContent": {"columnMatch": "SourceAgent"}, "centerContent": {"columnMatch": "HandoffCount", "formatter": 1}, "bottomContent": {"columnMatch": "TargetAgent"}, "nodeIdField": "SourceAgent", "sourceIdField": "SourceAgent", "targetIdField": "TargetAgent", "graphOrientation": 3, "edgeColorSettings": {"type": "None"}}}, "name": "agent-handoff-sankey"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "traces
| where operation_Name == 'mcp.tool.call'
| extend tool_name = tostring(customDimensions.tool_name),
         result_code = toint(customDimensions.result_code)
| summarize Calls = count(),
            SuccessRatePct = round(countif(result_code == 200) * 100.0 / count(), 1)
    by tool_name
| order by SuccessRatePct asc", "size": 0, "title": "Tool-Call Success Matrix", "timeContext": {"durationMs": 0}, "timeContextFromParameter": "TimeRange", "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.insights/components", "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"formatters": [{"columnMatch": "SuccessRatePct", "formatter": 8, "formatOptions": {"palette": "greenRed", "min": 0, "max": 100}}]}}, "name": "tool-call-success-matrix"}], "fallbackResourceIds": ["Azure Monitor"], "$schema": "https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
